_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide system related input on cybersecurity requirements to be included in statements of work and other appropriate procurement documents.
reference_document_element_description: Produce AI system documentation (model cards, evaluation reports) meeting the standards required for governance review, regulatory submission, or external audit.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-010 (RC, cosine: 0.514), SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.428). Shared vocabulary: [system]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, cybersecurity, documents, included, input, procurement] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audit, cards, documentation, evaluation, external] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.872, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:55.3%, C:44.7%). No dominant classification for "Provide system related input on cybersecurity requirements to be included in sta" vs "Produce AI system documentation (model cards, evaluation reports) meeting the st" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 > STS 0.428 (gap +0.090). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.6%. Shared tokens: [system]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, cybersecurity, documents, included, input, procurement]. WIDAI-only: [ai, audit, cards, documentation, evaluation, external].
